title: lappula tuberculata
intro: Lappula tuberculata, also known as hairy blue thistle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lappula tuberculata include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Lappula tuberculata is typically dried and used in infusions, teas, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
